narrative:
Tuscarawas 4 (precinct in Stark County) has 765 registered voters, with 54.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.5 percentage points.
